verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Babylon, Teaching me Her pleasure-driven ways Have some fun, Forget about tomorrow Live today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Her music and her passion, Hollywood and fashion Stimulate the flesh Just like wine And all the while she pulls Us all away from Everything divine

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But, I have heard a voice Calling me out of Babylon To a higher place There's a mountain I can live upon And I have made a choice Jesus is my joy and liberty Babylon will never, Never have its hold on me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Mystery reaches further to the soul Put religion on, Never let the spirit have control She stands against revival The Truth witihn the Bible Binding hungry hearts With chains of fear Somehow makes Confusion of the Word That God has made so clear.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, thank you, thank you Jesus, I'm so glad that
